alerts.title: Beirut: WARNING Risk Level
alerts.message: Risk score in Beirut has reached 70.1/100. Recent: Lebanon; Lebanon's displaced face rising hostility as airstrikes fuel fear and evictions; Israel says it has struck over 3,500 targets in Lebanon
alerts.recommendation: Elevated risk in Beirut. Increase patrols and monitoring frequency. Brief field units on current threat level.
